scripts.build: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:extension
scripts.dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage:binaries && code --extensionDevelopmentPath=./spire-extension --disable-extensions
scripts.test: pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:extension
scripts.package: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage:binaries && cd spire-extension && vsce package
